scope: nexus/scripts/bin/hexa_remote (multi-host SSH-routing wrapper, 1307 LOC) — sits between ~/.hx/bin/hexa resolver and remote sshd; pre-empts docker hard-landing fallback
approach: raw#9 hexa-only audit pattern — read source in chunks, live-probe hosts, mirror omega_audio_baseline.json structure ($0)

host_pool.preferred_default: ubu1 (from pick_preferred_host) — overridden to 'hetzner' for heavy-compute (drill|smash|free|absolute|meta-closure|hyperarithmetic) since 2026-04-25 raw#36
host_pool.chain_rationale: raw#36 fixpoint: RAM-headroom-descending. hetzner=128GB > ubu2=32GB > ubu1=32GB. htz alias terminal entry for LAN-down recovery (157.180.8.154 root)

ubu1.known_issue: post-2026-04-24 SSH banner-timeout flakiness, Korean-locale free output (LC_ALL=C forced)

ubu2.known_issue: absorbs all overflow → sshd OOM-killed → banner timeouts (Wave 11 motivated chain re-order)

host_pool.live_probe_2026-04-26: all 3 hosts up (ssh OK, uptime returned)

lock_protocol.mac_side_per_host_slots: /tmp/nexus_heavy_dispatch.<host>.slot<N>.lock — mkdir-atomic (macOS lacks flock(1)). Default N=1 per host, env HEXA_REMOTE_CONCURRENCY_<HOST>. Stale reclaim: dead-pid OR mtime > HEXA_REMOTE_SLOT_MAX_HOLD (3600s)
lock_protocol.host_side_global_flock: flock -E 64 -w 30 /tmp/hexa_real.lock — host-wide advisory lock (Wave 26, nxs-20260425-003 Phase 4). Catches non-Mac dispatch sources (nested spawn / sibling SSH / bypass). Heavy-only; lights bypass to preserve UX. Timeout exits 64 (was 60s, halved cycle 45)
lock_protocol.L6_xhost_workstealing_queue: /tmp/hexa_remote.queue.tsv — TSV (enqueue_ts deadline class pid cmd). Polling FIFO (5s default). Activated when all hosts unreachable+busy
lock_protocol.L7_psi_defer_queue: /tmp/hexa_remote.psi_queue.<host>.tsv — per-host FIFO when L4 PSI gate would reject. 300s TTL, 10s poll, dequeue on PSI < threshold or timeout→exit 64
lock_protocol.L5_bayes_history: /tmp/hexa_remote.history.<host>.<class>.tsv — START/END_<rc> records, posterior Beta(1,1)+Bernoulli on rc∈{137,143}. Reject when (kills+1)/(total+2) ≥ 30% (default), min 5 samples
lock_protocol.blacklist: /tmp/hexa_remote.blacklist.<host> — touch on probe fail, TTL 300s (HEXA_REMOTE_BLACKLIST_TTL). Wave 22 logs expiry

psi_admission_protocol.L4_picked_host_gate: ω-hexa-5 R5.4 (committed d84a0601, 2026-04-26 01:09): probe-time hard-reject if PSI avg10 > 80 (integer*100 > 8000). Bypass HEXA_REMOTE_NO_PSI_REJECT=1
psi_admission_protocol.psi_source: /proc/pressure/memory 'some avg10' — collected in same SSH round-trip as RAM/echo OK. macOS hosts have no /proc/pressure → empty string → gate skipped

reconnect_policy.raw_41_external_resource_roaming: _run_ssh_with_reconnect — exponential backoff 1→2→4s, max 3 retries (HEXA_REMOTE_RECONNECT_MAX). Worst case ~7s + ssh setup
reconnect_policy.retry_eligibility: stderr pattern match: ConnectTimeout / Network unreachable / No route to host / Connection reset / kex_exchange_identification / banner exchange / DNS — OR ssh rc=255 (transport)
reconnect_policy.non_retry_classes: auth fail, remote rc!=0, SIGKILL on remote — these would not improve via retry
reconnect_policy.rc_137_143_jetsam_distinguish: post-rc=137/143: if Darwin AND vm.loadavg ≥ 8 → presume Mac local jetsam SIGKILL (not remote OOM) → 1× retry on next chain host. fix8 (2026-04-25)
reconnect_policy.preflight: remote_preflight.hexa parallel TCP 300ms probe of FALLBACK_CHAIN. all_unreachable verdict → fast exit 64 (skip per-host ConnectTimeout×N). Bypass HEXA_REMOTE_SKIP_PREFLIGHT=1

path_rewrite_logic.macos_case_insensitive_handling: CWD/HOME lowercased for prefix detection; preserve original CWD as rsync source (pwd -P resolves symlinks → core/ canonical)
path_rewrite_logic.self_contained_cli_branch: $HOME/.hx/packages/*/cli/*.hexa or /bin/*.hexa → no rsync, REMOTE_ROOT=$HOME, REL=''. Catch-all for unmapped cwd
path_rewrite_logic.no_sync_arg_rewrite: Mac-absolute $HOME/.hx/* args bypass printf %q → injected as literal "$HOME/.hx/..." so remote shell expands to its own $HOME (hetzner=/root, ubu=/home/summer)
path_rewrite_logic.unmappable_fallthrough: non-CLI args at unmapped cwd → emit NEXUS_REMOTE_ERROR JSON (cwd_unmappable, exit_code:64). Caller (hexa resolver) parses JSON, decides exit 64 vs 74

recent_patches.summary: PSI avg10 > 80 hard-reject at probe time (lines 112-121). Empirical: hetzner observed 89.62

recent_patches.rationale: no reproducible stdout-suppression incident; PTY mode introduces UX regressions (CRLF, stderr merge, color); current ssh -T verified working multi-line. Reconsider triggers documented in omega_hexa_bundle_R5_R2_decision.json

recent_patches.summary: /tmp/hexa_real.lock + flock -E 64 -w 30 — captures non-Mac dispatch sources (cross-session OOM avoidance)
concurrency gate keyed on actual picked HOST not PREFERRED → load-aware pick honored
HEXA_REMOTE_DOCKER=1 → docker exec -i airgenome-claude (8GB cap, network=host); host RAM/sshd insulated from cgroup

physics_or_limits.ssh_round_trip_cost: ConnectTimeout default 8s × N hosts (preflight cuts to 300ms parallel TCP probe)
physics_or_limits.rsync_bandwidth_floor: incremental -aH --mkpath; SYNC_EXCLUDES per repo (anima excludes 87GB data trees; nexus excludes 3 symlinks-as-real conflict)
physics_or_limits.cgroup_OOM_threshold: ubu1/ubu2 MemoryMax=20G ⇒ smash/drill peak RSS ~30GB triggers SIGKILL rc=137; hetzner 80G cap accommodates
physics_or_limits.PSI_kernel_window: /proc/pressure/memory avg10 = 10s sliding window of task memory-stall % (Linux only — macOS hosts return empty)
physics_or_limits.mkdir_lock_latency: atomic across NFS/local; ~0.1s polling cadence; no auto-release (trap EXIT/INT/TERM responsible)
physics_or_limits.reconnect_worst_case: 1+2+4 = 7s backoff + 3× ssh setup ≈ 10-15s ceiling per host before chain advance
physics_or_limits.L5_bayes_min_sample: 5 records before posterior gate activates (learning phase silent)
physics_or_limits.raw_41_class_coverage: only network-class stderr signatures retried — auth and remote-rc!=0 explicit non-retry

friction_observed.rc_137_138_ambiguity: Darwin loadavg≥8 heuristic distinguishes Mac jetsam from remote OOM but is probabilistic — no PID provenance check. Could mislabel under transient Mac load
friction_observed.psi_threshold_static_on_observed_load: live audit found hetzner PSI 89.62 → all-host reject likely if other hosts also saturated (L7 queue mitigates but TTL=300s caps wait)
friction_observed.wave_21_docker_isolation_opt_in: HEXA_REMOTE_DOCKER=1 still opt-in; default heavy-compute path uses systemd-run --scope on host → still subject to shared sshd OOM if cap mis-sized
friction_observed.rsync_warn_silent: rc=0 + non-empty stderr saved to /tmp/hexa_remote_last_rsync_warn.log but does not surface to caller — symlink-vs-realdir mismatches can accumulate undetected
friction_observed.lock_file_proliferation: 5 distinct /tmp lock+state file families (slot, blacklist, queue, psi_queue, history). No GC cron; relies on per-process EXIT trap — orphans on SIGKILL cleanup pending
friction_observed.preflight_exit_code_workaround: remote_preflight.hexa exit code unreliable (upstream exit(74) bug) → wrapper relies on stderr JSON verdict parsing — fragile if preflight output format drifts
friction_observed.korean_locale_silent_drop: LC_ALL=C added 2026-04-25 after ubu1 returned '메모리:' instead of 'Mem:' → silent RAM=?MB → wrong host skip. Other awk patterns may have similar locale exposure
friction_observed.no_local_psi_proxy: macOS hosts can't surface PSI → entire L4/L5/L7 queue chain skipped on those probes; remote-only health asymmetry

next_cycles: omega-network-2 — fallback latency budget (preflight 300ms vs ConnectTimeout 8s ratios; chain depth = 4)
omega-network-3 — lock contention spectrum (5 file families × per-host) — design for unified GC + state inspector
omega-network-4 — PSI threshold tuning (static 80 vs adaptive on host moving baseline; class-default 45/65/85 calibration)
omega-network-5 — docker isolation policy promotion (Wave 21 opt-in → conditional default for high-PSI fallback; replaces L7 queue in saturation)
omega-network-6 — reconnect backoff calibration (1-2-4 vs 0.5-1-2-4 jittered; raw#41 class extension for partial-rsync resume)
omega-network-7 — rc-137/143 provenance hardening (loadavg heuristic → process-tree probe to distinguish Mac SIGKILL vs remote OOM deterministically)
omega-network-8 — locale & probe-output format hardening (LC_ALL=C universal + structured probe protocol vs free-text awk parsing)
